headline: Avery Dennison, ReCircled RFID pilot ‘proves circular fashion can scale’
summary: Avery Dennison's pilot project with ReCircled achieved 99% accuracy in automated garment sorting using RFID tags, substantially reducing labour hours for garment identification and processing.
